channel.title: Game on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Game on Arrans github.io

item.title: hajimehoshi/ebiten
item.description: Ebitengine - A dead simple 2D game engine for Go

item.title: opengaming/osgameclones
item.description: Open Source Clones of Popular Games

item.title: leereilly/games
item.description: 🎮 A list of popular/awesome video games, add-ons, maps, etc. hosted on GitHub. Any genre. Any platform. Any engine.

item.title: alexbatalov/fallout1-ce
item.description: Fallout for modern operating systems

item.title: open-source-flash/open-source-flash
item.description: Petition to open source Flash and Shockwave spec

item.title: omf2097/openomf
item.description: One Must Fall 2097 Remake

item.title: dialogic-godot/dialogic
item.description: 💬 Create Dialogs, Visual Novels, RPGs, and manage Characters with Godot to create your Game!

item.title: ihhub/fheroes2
item.description: fheroes2 is a recreation of Heroes of Might and Magic II game engine.

item.title: andymeneely/squib
item.description: A Ruby DSL for prototyping card games.

item.title: ebitenui/ebitenui
item.description: User interface engine and widget library for Ebiten

item.title: OpenDiablo2/OpenDiablo2
item.description: An open source re-implementation of Diablo 2

item.title: hajimehoshi/go-inovation
item.description: Go port of Inovation 2007 by Omega

item.title: endless-sky/endless-sky
item.description: Space exploration, trading, and combat game.

item.title: vcmi/vcmi
item.description: Open-source engine for Heroes of Might and Magic III

item.title: alexbatalov/fallout2-ce
item.description: Fallout 2 for modern operating systems

item.title: xoreos/xoreos
item.description: A reimplementation of BioWare’s Aurora engine (and derivatives). Pre-pre-alpha :P

item.title: cxong/cdogs-sdl
item.description: Classic overhead run-and-gun game

item.title: etlegacy/etlegacy
item.description: ET: Legacy is an open source project based on the code of Wolfenstein: Enemy Territory which was released in 2010 under the terms of the GPLv3 license.

item.title: diasurgical/devilution
item.description: Diablo devolved - magic behind the 1996 computer game

item.title: candybox2/candybox2.github.io
item.description: Candy Box 2

item.title: FullScreenShenanigans/FullScreenPokemon
item.description: A free HTML5 remake of the original Pokemon, expanded for modern browsing.

item.description: Binary Tetris

item.title: lmartinking/cdogs-sdl
item.description: C-Dogs SDL Action/Arcade Game

item.title: arran4/golang-rpg-textbox
item.description: Golang image library to Renders a RPG style text box with word wrapped text of your choosing
